session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do not fix anything.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target from repository root

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here are the results:
## Summary
**Status: FAILED** - Prettier code style issues found
### Build and Installation - Successfully built `erk-dev` package - Downloaded and installed 58 packages in 186ms
### Warnings Two files have code style issues that Prettier flagged: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### Passed Checks ✓ Linting: All checks passed ✓ ruff formatting: 1666 files already formatted ✓ Markdown checking: OK ✓ Exec reference check: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date ✓ ty type checking: All checks passed ✓ AGENTS.md standard check: PASSED ✓ CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md pairing check: All properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations)
### Test Results ✓ Unit Tests (erk): **5725 passed** in 23.35s ✓ Tests (erk-dev): **136 passed** in 4.74s ✓ Tests (erk-statusline): **115 passed** in 0.89s ✓ Tests (erk-mcp): **24 passed**
### Failure Point **Prettier Check**: Code style issues found in 2 files. The build failed at the Prettier formatting check stage.
The exit code 2 indicates the make recipe encountered an error, specifically from the Prettier check finding style violations in markdown files.
